violations.text: The individual cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 3-door low boy. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the Ansul discharge pipes have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris and were observed with drips beginning to form above the tilt skillet and other equipment. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing to prevent the potential of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025

Several areas of the ceiling in the kitchen were observed with chipped paint or exposed air ventilation ducting and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Several areas in the kitchen were observed with low grout and cracked tiles, including coving around the corner leading to the venue space and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
